plugins.name: quant-research
plugins.description: v1.0 — Quant finance research protocol skill: R&D / Pure Research disciplines, Heilmeier / PR-FAQ entry, two-layer decomposition with TRL + lifecycle, Cooper Stage-Gates, A0-A5 analysis depth as primary deliverable, AEA-style pre-registration with hash-lock + diff, two-axis review (process + conclusion). v1.0 removes standalone experiment-review (folded in).
